---
title: "Topic B — Practice Session: Assignment"
date: "2026-10-20"
author: "Prof. Jane Smith"
organization: "My University"
institute: "Institute of Something"
email: "jane.smith@university.edu"
course: "My Course"
term: "WS 2026"
lang: "en"
format:
  html: default
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    papersize: a4
    include-in-header: ../../assets/latex/_handout-packages.tex
    template-partials:
      - ../../assets/latex/before-body.tex
due: "2026-10-27"
reference-section-title: "References"
---

## Instructions

TODO: Describe the assignment task.

## Tasks

1. TODO

## Submission

TODO: Add submission instructions.
